'''Prevaro''' was a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] who came with information of interest to [[Savan|Azool]], whom he believed to be [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor]] in disguise. It turned out that Azool was actually Xizor's niece, who intended to take over [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]], and for that end she took Prevaro as her lieutenant.

==Biography==
Knowing that Azool was looking for the [[human replica droid]] [[Guri]], who had gone rogue after Xizor's death, Prevaro visited him at [[Azool's Antiques]] in the [[Southern Underground/Legends|Southern Underground]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], and sold him relevant information. Soon after, Azool contacted [[bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Kar Yang]] to arrange her capture at the location the ''[[Stinger]]'' was last seen.<ref name="Shadows of the Empire: Evolution 1">[[Shadows of the Empire: Evolution 1|''Shadows of the Empire: Evolution'' 1]]</ref>

Prevaro returned to Azool, right when he was receiving an update from Kar Yang; Prevaro came to believe that Azool was Xizor in disguise, having survived from the [[Battle over Coruscant]] according to some rumors, and was ready to turn him in. To his surprise, Azool revealed that he was actually [[Savan]], Xizor's niece. She explained her plan to take over [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] with Guri's help, and avenge her uncle's death. For this, she hired Prevaro and made him her lieutenant.<ref name="Shadows of the Empire: Evolution 2">[[Shadows of the Empire: Evolution 2|''Shadows of the Empire: Evolution'' 2]]</ref> Prevaro was surprised to see that Savan had rigged [[Lintu]], Yang's droid, to spy on his own master for her, to ensure that Yang remained faithful to her. Indeed, after informing Prevaro that the faked assault convinced everyone that [[Vekker (Quarren)|Vekker]] was responsible, she mentioned Yang's treachery, and that she would complete his job. Prevaro doubted that Savan could handle Guri, but she ensured him that she had the codes to control her.<ref name="Shadows of the Empire: Evolution 3">[[Shadows of the Empire: Evolution 3|''Shadows of the Empire: Evolution'' 3]]</ref>

They determined that Guri had gone to the scientist [[Massad Thrumble]] and they went together to [[Hurd's Moon]] on a mission to capture Guri with Prevaro wondering how they would locate her in such a big moon. Following the traces of Lintu, Prevaro first spotted the droid's remains, being shot by Kar Yang. Soon Savan met her contact, [[Skahtul]], who warned her that nobody was able to approach Guri after Kar Yang because of Thumble's defenses. Savan could not wait for an opportunity to show up and discussed other options with Prevaro, giving him money to find help for their task. Soon Prevaro presented a group of newly hired thugs of several species and sizes to Savan, and led the operation.<ref name="Shadows of the Empire: Evolution 4">[[Shadows of the Empire: Evolution 4|''Shadows of the Empire: Evolution'' 4]]</ref>

The band [[Skirmish on Hurd's Moon|stormed]] Thumble's facility and had to fight a [[security droid/Legends|security droid]] and then a trapped door. With most of their team dead, and hearing some shooting in a corridor--unknown to them, [[Spinda Caveel]] and the [[Pike Sisters]] had a [[Lightfight]] with the [[Heroes of Yavin/Legends|Heroes of Yavin]]. Savan and Prevaro reached Thrumble's operating room, only to find it empty. They went to the remaining thugs near Guri's ship, the ''[[Stinger]]'', who waited for her, and he and Savan split to look for her. 

It was Prevaro who spotted first [[Massad Thrumble]] helping Guri walk, and per Savan's orders he called the thugs against them. While Guri fought and defeated them, Prevaro and some thugs encountered the [[Heroes of Yavin/Legends|Heroes of Yavin]]. Prevaro said to the bewildered mercenary that he is not paid to ask questions and they shot against them, with [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], who [[Cho mai/Legends|cut off]] his right hand. Meanwhile, Savan reached Guri, but was thrown down by her.<ref name="Shadows of the Empire: Evolution 5">[[Shadows of the Empire: Evolution 5|''Shadows of the Empire: Evolution'' 5]]</ref>
